description: Add a toggle in the same selector as board and list view to view agent view

log.outcome: This is a well-crafted specification for a small UI enhancement. The mission is clear, steps are concrete and verifiable, file references match real code, and testing requirements are appropriately rigorous. The spec correctly identifies that this is a view-layer refactoring that extracts existing AgentListModal patterns into a first-class inline view alongside board and list views.
